description: Multiple students and faculty begin calling to report that the LMS is inaccessible.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the multiple reports and perform a quick check on the LMS status page.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the system is down.

nodes.task_description: Escalate the issue to the university's central IT services as a high-priority incident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a P1 ticket for the system administrators.

nodes.task_description: Update the help desk's recorded message to inform callers of the known outage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the phone system greeting to manage call volume.
